sheet_title: Review remote connector access before attaching.

requester.requester_label: Remote connector requests access to attach to the selected host.

authority_owner.source_label: Shell-owned remote attach review; the connector cannot expand scope without explicit authority.

policy_lock.lock_explanation: No policy lock blocks remote attach; user choice controls whether attach proceeds and what is remembered.

target_scope.target_label: Remote workspace on SSH host 203.0.113.10; local workspace state is not widened automatically.

grant_scope_options.label: This session only; expires when the remote session ends.

target_scope.remembered_scope_consequence: Session grants expire when the remote session ends; remembered grants must be explicitly requested and are revocable from Trust & Permissions.
target_scope.revocation_route_label: Open Trust & Permissions → Remote attaches to revoke remembered remote access.

capability_groups.requested_access_label: Attach to the remote host and open a remote workspace session.
capability_groups.why_needed_label: Attaching requires a connector-mediated session bound to the selected host identity.
capability_groups.purpose_label: Open the remote workspace and forward editor/terminal interactions.
capability_groups.reconsent_trigger_label: Re-consent is required if the attach target identity changes or the connector requests additional capabilities.
capability_groups.denied_by_default_behavior_label: If denied, the local workspace remains available and no remote session is created.

capability_groups.requested_access_label: Open network connections required for the remote session and port forwarding.
capability_groups.why_needed_label: The remote session requires network transport to the selected host and declared endpoints.
capability_groups.purpose_label: Maintain the remote attach transport and declared forwarding lanes.
capability_groups.reconsent_trigger_label: Re-consent is required if transport endpoints widen beyond the declared attach target.
capability_groups.denied_by_default_behavior_label: If denied, the remote session cannot connect and attach is blocked.

reduced_mode_options.label: Open remote instructions only
reduced_mode_options.behavior_summary: Does not attach; opens a host-owned or browser-owned instructions page for manual setup.

transitive_scope_disclosure.summary_label: Remote attach uses a helper component; effective access includes helper-mediated transport and may require host-managed permission steps.

closure_members.member_label: Helper: port-forward agent running alongside the remote session.

inheritance_edges.explanation: Remote attach depends on a helper to maintain declared forwarding lanes.
Helper component bundles additional network transport responsibilities under the same attach session.

approval_path.host_flow_explanation: The platform may require a host-owned permission step to allow network access for the helper component.
approval_path.browser_or_device_step_explanation: No browser/device handoff is required for SSH attach.

sheet_actions.label: Attach to remote host for this session
Allow
sheet_actions.product_explanatory_label: Complete system permission step for remote attach

sheet_actions.label: Do not attach to remote host
